scripts.format: oxfmt .dockerignore .github/workflows docker-compose.yml docker-compose.dev.yml .gitignore docs e2e frontend scripts oxlint.config.ts package.json playwright.config.ts README.md tsconfig.json vite.config.ts ercot-collector ercot-receiver/server.py ercot-receiver/test_server.py ercot-receiver/README.md --ignore-path .oxfmtignore --write
scripts.format:check: oxfmt .dockerignore .github/workflows docker-compose.yml docker-compose.dev.yml .gitignore docs e2e frontend scripts oxlint.config.ts package.json playwright.config.ts README.md tsconfig.json vite.config.ts ercot-collector ercot-receiver/server.py ercot-receiver/test_server.py ercot-receiver/README.md --ignore-path .oxfmtignore --check
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check
scripts.test:collector:live: docker run --rm --entrypoint deno ercot-collector:local run --allow-net --allow-env --cached-only live_verify.ts
scripts.validate:commit: pnpm run check && pnpm run test:frontend && pnpm run test:receiver
